title: Skeptrostachys disoides
taxonomy: Skeptrostachys disoides is classified under the family Asclepiadaceae, which is now often included in the family Apocynaceae, and it belongs to the genus Skeptrostachys. This plant is native to South America and is known for its unique characteristics. The classification of Skeptrostachys disoides also places it within the order Gentianales. Further, the species is categorized as a monocot, which falls under the phylum Magnoliophyta. It is essential to note that plant classification may change over time as research and understanding evolve.
